title: Spicy Light Turkish Millet Stir-fry
description: A crowd-pleasing, spicy and light turkish dish featuring millet as the main ingredient, prepared with a tadka base for authentic taste.
instructions: Rinse the pearl millet under cold water and soak it in 3 cups of water for about 30 minutes.
Drain the water from the soaked millet and transfer to a blender. Add 2 cups of fresh water, blend until smooth, then strain into another container to cool.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add crushed garlic cloves and sliced red chili pepper, stir-fry for about 1 minute.
Toss the cooled millet mixture into the hot pan with salt to taste. Cook for 5-7 minutes until slightly thickened.
Squeeze lemon juice over the dish and stir gently before serving.
